round2_fixes_verified.MAJOR_audit_wave_dependency: FIXED — Audit Wave header now reads '(паралельно — sequential after Wave 5)'; HTML comment on line 375 confirms auditors read final-code feature scope after all implementation waves complete. Dependency is explicit and unambiguous.
round2_fixes_verified.MINOR_AC15_cookie_assertion: FIXED — Testing Strategy LangSwitcher spec (line 197) now explicitly asserts useCookie('i18n_lang').value === 'en' after click, per AC15 'cookie оновлений'. Cookie mock via mocked useCookie — asserting value, not deep plumbing. Compliant with AC15 literal wording.

findings.requirement: US-1 (AC1) / user-spec narrative: Cookie живе 1 рік
findings.detail: Decision 3 documents that v9 detectBrowserLanguage does not accept cookieMaxAge as an option (verified via Context7: option not listed). Tech-spec relies on module default TTL described as '~1 рік' — an approximation, not a guaranteed 365-day TTL. The user-spec requirement states exactly '1 рік'. The deviation is documented with rationale and source citation in Decision 3, but the User-Spec Deviations section says 'None', which is slightly inconsistent — this is a technical constraint worth a one-line entry there. Severity is minor given thorough documentation in Decision 3.

findings.requirement: US-15 (AC15): Vitest spec — LangSwitcher test assertions
findings.detail: Architecture 'What we're building' section (Vitest spec для LangSwitcher bullet) states assertions include 'navigateTo calls'. However Decision 12 explicitly states setLocale(code) is the standalone canonical v9 pattern with auto-navigate — no explicit navigateTo call is made in the component. Testing Strategy (line 197) correctly drops the navigateTo assertion and asserts cookie value instead. The Architecture bullet is stale and contradicts both Decision 12 and Testing Strategy. A reader scanning only the Architecture section gets misleading guidance about what the test should assert. The Testing Strategy is authoritative, but the contradiction in Architecture creates confusion.

summary: 19/19 requirements covered (17 full, 2 partial — both minor). Both Round 2 findings are confirmed fixed: Audit Wave now has explicit 'sequential after Wave 5' dependency with supporting HTML comment; AC15 cookie assertion (useCookie('i18n_lang').value === 'en') is now present in Testing Strategy. Two new minor findings: (1) cookieMaxAge relies on undocumented module default (~1 рік) because v9 API does not expose this option — documented in Decision 3 with Context7 citation but absent from User-Spec Deviations section; (2) Architecture section 'Vitest spec для LangSwitcher' bullet still mentions 'navigateTo calls' assertion, contradicting Decision 12 (setLocale auto-navigates, no explicit navigateTo) and Testing Strategy which correctly omits it. No critical gaps, no scope creep, no shallow solution, no overengineering, wave dependencies coherent. Status: PASS.
